tools.name: all.createNetworkGroupExternalPeer
tools.description: Adds an external peer to a Network Group.

tools.name: all.createNetworkGroupMember
tools.description: Adds a member to a Network Group.

tools.name: all.deleteLogsAppIdDrainsIdOrUrl
tools.description: Delete the logs drain by id or url for a given application

tools.name: all.deleteNetworkGroupExternalPeer
tools.description: Removes an external peer from a Network Group.

tools.name: all.deleteNetworkGroupMember
tools.description: Removes a member from a Network Group.

tools.name: all.deleteNetworkGroupPeer
tools.description: Removes a peer from a Network Group.

tools.name: all.deleteOrganisationsIdAddonprovidersProviderId
tools.description: Remove a given add-on provider. providerId must be owned by organisation {id}.

tools.name: all.deleteV3LogsAppIdDrainsIdOrUrl
tools.description: Delete the logs drain by id or url for a given application

tools.name: all.getEventsEventSocket
tools.description: Retrieve events as they come through a websocket connection. To have authorization, you have to send a `{ "message_type": "oauth", "authorization": "oauth authorization string" }` message

tools.name: all.getLogsAppId
tools.description: Fetch the logs for a given application

tools.name: all.getLogsAppIdDrains
tools.description: Fetch the logs drains for a given application

tools.name: all.getLogsAppIdDrainsIdOrUrl
tools.description: Fetch the logs drain by id or url for a given application

tools.name: all.getLogsAppIdSse
tools.description: Retrieve logs as they come through a sse connection. To have authorization, you have to add `authorization=oAuthAuthorizationString` as query param.

tools.name: all.getLogsDrains
tools.description: Fetch all the logs drains (ccadmin dedicated route)

tools.name: all.getLogsLogsChunkedAppId
tools.description: Retrieve logs as they come through a chunked, never-ending response

tools.name: all.getLogsLogsSocketAppId
tools.description: Retrieve logs as they come through a websocket connection. To have authorization, you have to send a `{ "message_type": "oauth", "authorization": "oauth authorization string" }` message

tools.name: all.getLogsSocketAppId
tools.description: WebSocket to get logs for :appID. Optional queryString arg bind_to_es=true to bind WS on log storage and not real time AMQP broker

tools.name: all.getNetworkGroup
tools.description: Gets details of a Network Group.

tools.name: all.getNetworkGroupMember
tools.description: Gets details of a Network Group member.

tools.name: all.getNetworkGroupPeer
tools.description: Gets details of a Network Group peer.

tools.name: all.getNetworkGroupStream
tools.description: Retrieves the current Network Group details as a Server Sent Event.

tools.name: all.getNetworkGroupWireGuardConfiguration
tools.description: Gets the current WireGuard® tunnel configuration file for a Network Group peer.

tools.name: all.getNetworkGroupWireGuardConfigurationStream
tools.description: Gets the current WireGuard® tunnel configuration file for a Network Group peer as a Server Sent Event.

tools.name: all.getOpenapiType
tools.description: Get the swagger for this API as {type}. Type can be either "yml" or "json".

tools.name: all.getV3LogsAppId
tools.description: Fetch the logs for a given application

tools.name: all.getV3LogsAppIdDrains
tools.description: Fetch the logs drains for a given application

tools.name: all.getV3LogsAppIdDrainsIdOrUrl
tools.description: Fetch the logs drain by id or url for a given application

tools.name: all.getV3LogsAppIdLogsChunked
tools.description: Retrieve logs as they come through a chunked, never-ending response

tools.name: all.getV3LogsAppIdLogsSocket
tools.description: Retrieve logs as they come through a websocket connection. To have authorization, you have to send a `{ "message_type": "oauth", "authorization": "oauth authorization string" }` message

tools.name: all.listNetworkGroupMembers
tools.description: Lists members in a Network Group.

tools.name: all.listNetworkGroupPeers
tools.description: Lists peers in a Network Group.

tools.name: all.listNetworkGroups
tools.description: Lists Network Groups from an owner.

tools.name: all.postLogsAppIdDrains
tools.description: Add a log drain for a given application

tools.name: all.postNotificationsEmailhooksOwnerId
tools.description: create a hook for e-mail notifications

tools.name: all.postOrganisationsIdApplications
tools.description: Creates an application. If you want to create a Github app, you need to replace the oauthApp field with what you will find here: https://github.com/CleverCloud/doc.clever-cloud.com/issues/179

tools.name: all.postSelfApplications
tools.description: Creates an application. If you want to create a Github app, you need to replace the oauthApp field with what you will find here: https://github.com/CleverCloud/doc.clever-cloud.com/issues/179

tools.name: all.postV3LogsAppIdDrains
tools.description: Add a log drain for a given application

tools.name: all.putLogsDrainsDrainId
tools.description: Fetch all the logs drains (ccadmin dedicated route)

tools.name: all.putOrganisationsIdAvatar
tools.description: If you want to upload an image from your computer, send the image in the body of the request without anything else.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
